endpoint_expectations.readiness_gate: provider stack status returned without secrets

endpoint_expectations.body_policy: metadata query body only; response body read remains blocked unless explicitly gated

endpoint_expectations.mutation: stage only; no apply without approval and package payload
endpoint_expectations.readiness_gate: owner approval plus package payload manifest

endpoint_expectations.mutation: operator-gated package apply with rollback snapshot

endpoint_expectations.readiness_gate: contract status is visible before CAD export
contract sections and package readiness exposed
CAD intent is reviewable; export remains later

proof_chain: evidence, score, route, lifecycle, or update readiness output
purpose: Prove what Claire expects at important endpoints using industry-standard contract, governance, security, package-integrity, and observability controls.

standards.purpose: Machine-readable HTTP contract for external and dashboard callers.

standards.claire_control: operator-gated request bodies, no autonomous body reads, no unsafe tool execution
standards.purpose: Input validation, output handling, prompt/tool boundary, and body-read safety.

standards.claire_control: governed route gates, review queues, readiness scoring, runtime truth
standards.purpose: Govern, Map, Measure, and Manage AI/runtime route risk.

standards.claire_control: change-control and update-governance routes remain owner approved
standards.purpose: AI management-system discipline for lifecycle, change control, and review.

standards.claire_control: status, proof, rollback, and readiness endpoints
standards.purpose: Govern, Identify, Protect, Detect, Respond, and Recover posture for operations.

standards.claire_control: tests, py_compile, package staging, owner review before install
standards.purpose: Secure software development and release gate practice.

standards.claire_control: governed update package file manifest and rollback snapshot requirement
standards.purpose: Package integrity, provenance, rollback, and tamper-resistance expectations.

standards.claire_control: package payload must expose files, checksums, and dependency metadata before apply
standards.purpose: Dependency and component transparency for endpoint-delivered install packages.

standards.claire_control: runtime status, proof pack, route integrity, and event outputs
standards.purpose: Trace, metric, and log expectations for runtime route operations.

frameworks.governance_gate: manual promotion required; runtime truth mutation blocked
frameworks.runtime_behavior: assessment returns route-vector and risk posture without mutating route truth
update proposals remain review-only until governed install criteria pass

frameworks.control: operator command planning with tool/body-read boundaries
frameworks.governance_gate: compatibility aliases compute no new truth and do not unlock tools
frameworks.runtime_behavior: commands produce plans and governed search requests without autonomous execution

frameworks.governance_gate: proof must remain clean before attaching new layers
frameworks.runtime_behavior: dependency chain reports passed/blocked steps and recovery boundaries

frameworks.governance_gate: frontend calls must be active, aliased, duplicate, or removed; missing is not allowed
frameworks.runtime_behavior: stale routes resolve through compatibility aliases that disclose they compute no new truth

frameworks.control: staged package provenance and rollback gate
frameworks.governance_gate: package stage requires owner-approved proposal and package metadata
frameworks.runtime_behavior: staging prepares install evidence without applying code automatically

frameworks.governance_gate: package payload must disclose endpoint owners, package files, and dependency expectations
frameworks.runtime_behavior: industry package emits machine-readable inventory for downstream SBOM generation

frameworks.control: runtime status, proof, and route observability
frameworks.governance_gate: runtime observation may not mutate runtime truth
frameworks.runtime_behavior: status endpoints expose runtime, truth, queue, and proof signals for trace/metric/log binding
